evidence_summary: Establish a diplomatic connection between the protagonist and Martian forces through a symbolic peace gesture, facilitating his transition from captivity to transport.

The Leader dismounts unarmed and offers a metal armlet as a peace gesture. The protagonist accepts, signaling friendship. He is then hoisted onto a Martian mount and taken away toward the distant hills.
The Leader dismounts unarmed in the basin facing the protagonist.
A cavalcade moves away from the camera toward the distant hills.
The exchange of a metal armlet followed by the protagonist being mounted and transported.
